text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after Daiwa Scarlet's debut...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My, would you look at that! Another special on
Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's just Scarlet and Vodka, everywhere I look...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
How about this for a scoop? The talented
Magical Girl Sweepy is killing it in the big
leagues!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. Don't go picking fights, or I'll have to
sound the gong!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...The gong?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh! Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, take a look at this article—"The Future
Queens of Racing!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
First place is Vodka, and then next is...
you—Scarlet!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Which makes me the runner-up.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You look disappointed. I thought that would be
quite an honor!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Sorry! I shouldn't be talking like that in front
of you...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, don't worry about it. A refined princess is
patient in all things! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But you should take more pride in yourself! Many
people would give a lot for what you have!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Great, now I feel like garbage. And it's all
because of her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! D-don't get the wrong idea! I would never
say something so―

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's just you. Geez, don't scare me like that...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? Vodka. Everyone just keeps
going on and on about how great she is.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She's so annoying! And she's wrecking all my hard
work!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean, why?! She stole my number
one spot!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Everyone sings your praises when you're number
one! Like, "Wow, look at her! She's so cool!" You
know!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But when you get second place, it's all, "Well, you
tried your best. You'll get it next time."

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I don't want pity. I want admiration.
choice_data_list: You're already number one in my book.
You're already number one in my book.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So what?! That's not what I'm looking to hear,
dummy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Good grief... What I'm trying to say is that I need you to be giving your all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Once I get first place in the Classics, everyone
will start looking at me differently.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: So I can't slack off while I'm still a junior.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll train, and train, and train, until I'm strong enough to snatch number one. And then...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll blow them all away with beauty and grace in
my first Classic race!
